title: stelis rectangularis
intro: Stelis rectangularis is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its distinctive rectangular-shaped leaves and small white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis rectangularis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
